zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL处于窄幅震荡偏弱结构，价格贴近日内低位，整体动能不足。短线缺乏突破动能，以横盘整理为主。多空博弈较为均衡但略偏空。震荡延续。

MACD为负值且无信号线支撑，显示空头动能占优，短期反弹持续性有限。价格运行于SMA20下方，趋势偏弱。需关注反抽压力确认。信号偏弱。

当前价格紧贴68.60支撑位，上方68.90及69.20构成短期阻力区。若跌破支撑或触发进一步回撤。整体区间震荡格局未变延续。

操作上建议以区间低吸高抛为主，控制仓位，等待明确突破方向。避免追涨杀跌，优先风控。关注量能放大后的方向确认。谨慎交易为主。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is currently trading near 68.64, showing a largely neutral short-term structure after a period of mild weakness. The price remains slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 68.89, suggesting that buyers have not yet regained full control of momentum. The narrow daily range between 68.61 and 68.78 highlights a consolidation phase, where market participants appear to be waiting for a stronger directional catalyst before committing to larger positions.

The available momentum indicators provide a cautiously bearish undertone. MACD remains in negative territory at -0.3989, indicating that downward pressure from previous sessions has not been fully absorbed. While the absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, the combination of a negative MACD and price trading beneath the SMA(20) suggests that bullish momentum remains weak. Traders should watch for a MACD stabilization or bullish crossover as an early signal of improving sentiment.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 68.60, which aligns closely with the session low. A break below this zone could expose the market to further downside toward the 68.00 psychological level. On the upside, resistance is visible near the SMA(20) at 68.89, followed by a stronger barrier around 69.20–69.50 where sellers may re-emerge. A decisive move above these levels would strengthen the case for a short-term trend reversal.

Given the current setup, a cautious approach appears appropriate. Short-term traders may consider range-trading strategies while price remains trapped between support and resistance. More aggressive bullish positions would ideally wait for a sustained close above 68.90 accompanied by stronger momentum confirmation. Conversely, a breakdown below 68.60 could favor defensive positioning and increased downside risk. Risk management remains essential, as the current low-volatility environment can quickly transition into a directional breakout.
